title: A universal framework for all orbital phenomena
abstract: We propose a universal framework that explains all orbital phenomena from spacecraft control to galaxy formation. The framework overturns conventional mechanics and reveals a new paradigm for every orbiting system. We outline the vision and discuss broad implications.
manuscript_text: The manuscript develops a sweeping philosophical argument about unification but does not present a reconstructable derivation, model, experiment, dataset, figure, or benchmark object. The paper claims universal explanatory power across all orbital systems.
ethics_and_disclosures: The authors declare no competing interests.
